title: Boat Through Lilies
description: Prevent Boats from getting stuck on Lily Pads
body:
> **NOTE:** _This mod is packaged as part of [Great Big World](https://modrinth.com/mod/great-big-world) and was made a standalone mod so that players can enjoy it separately. Do not download both with the intent of using them together._

# Boat Through Lilies
A simple mod that makes Boats pass through & break Lily Pads.

This is a nice change for those who want to travel more easily through swamp biomes, but always get stuck running into Lily Pads.

> _This mod is free to use in modpacks with credit._
